title: The Amazing Mr. X
writer: Crane Wilbur, Muriel Roy Bolton, Ian McLellan Hunter
actors: Turhan Bey, Lynn Bari, Cathy O'Donnell
plot: On the beach one night, Christine Faber, two years a widow, thinks she hears her late husband Paul calling out of the surf; then meets a tall dark man Alexis, who seems to know all about such things.
